ships.name: USS Nimitz
ships.status: May 7, USS Nimitz anchored at Anchorage #1 in Guanabara Bay, approx. 1 n.m. west of Niteroi, Brazil, for a five-day liberty port visit to Rio de Janeiro.

ships.name: USS Dwight D. Eisenhower
ships.status: April 24, 2026 USS Dwight D. Eisenhower moored at Pier 11N on Naval Station Norfolk after a four-day underway for sea trials, following a 16-month availability; Underway for flight deck certification and CQ, with the Carrier Air Wing (CVW) 3, on May 5.

ships.name: USS Carl Vinson
ships.status: September 16, The Carl Vinson moored at Juliet Pier on Naval Air Station North Island after a three-day underway for ammo offload.

ships.name: USS Theodore Roosevelt
ships.status: No recent status found.

ships.name: USS Abraham Lincoln
ships.status: March 10,  USS Abraham Lincoln conducted a replenishment-at-sea with the USNS Henry J. Kaiser, while underway in the North Arabian Sea;  Conducted a replenishment-at-sea again on March 18 and 28th;  Conducted a replenishment-at-sea with the USNS Carl Brashear on April 18 and 19th.

ships.name: USS George Washington
ships.status: May 10, USS George Washington departed Fleet Activities Yokosuka  for sea trials following a four-month Selected Restricted Availability (SRA).

ships.name: USS George H.W. Bush
ships.status: April 27, USS George H.W. Bush CSG-10 recently arrived on station in the North Arabian Sea in support of Operation Epic Fury.

ships.name: USS Wasp
ships.status: April 14, USS Wasp moored at Berth 6, Pier 11 on Naval Station Norfolk after a 10-day underway for deck landing qualifications, in the Virginia Capes Op. Area; Underway again on April 28; Moored at Berth 6, Pier 6 on May 9; Moved "dead-stick" to Pier 1 in BAE Systems shipyard on May 19.

ships.status: April 27, The Kearsarge moored at Berth 4, Pier 14 on Naval Station Norfolk; Underway again on May 4.

ships.name: USS Makin Island
ships.status: April 17, The Makin Island anchored approx. 2 n.m. off the coast of Camp Pendleton Boat Basin for a brief stop; Moored at Naval Weapons Station Seal Beach for ammo onload from April 20-29; Moored at Berth 5, Pier 8 on April 30; Underway for Surface Warfare Advanced Tactical Training (SWATT) exercise on May 8.
